description: Run ruff format on any .py file after Claude writes to it
Validate Python best practices: type hints, Pydantic models, async patterns, error handling

action.command: grep -n 'except:' "${filePath}" && echo '⚠️  Bare except clause - use specific exceptions' || true; grep -n 'class Config:' "${filePath}" && echo '⚠️  Pydantic v1 Config class - use ConfigDict instead' || true; grep -n 'requests\.' "${filePath}" && grep -q 'async def' "${filePath}" && echo '⚠️  requests in async code - use httpx.AsyncClient' || true; grep -n 'time\.sleep' "${filePath}" && grep -q 'async def' "${filePath}" && echo '⚠️  time.sleep in async - use asyncio.sleep()' || true; echo '✓ Python best practices check complete'

description: Run pre-commit hooks on modified Python files

action.command: cd "$(dirname "${filePath}" | xargs -I {} git -C {} rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo /home/kaushal/Plugins)" && pre-commit run --files "${filePath}" --color=always 2>&1 || echo '✓ Pre-commit check complete (or not configured)'
